entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Major oilseed crop studied for aflatoxin contamination in India

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of toxic metabolites produced by Aspergillus flavus in groundnut kernels

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: The fungal organism responsible for producing aflatoxins in groundnuts

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study on aflatoxin prevalence was conducted

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A major groundnut growing state in India

entities.name: GUJARAT
entities.description: A major groundnut growing state in India

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: A major groundnut growing state in India

entities.name: TAMIL NADU
entities.description: A major groundnut growing state in India

entities.name: SOIL PH
entities.description: The measure of acidity or alkalinity of the soil affecting aflatoxin levels

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: The organic carbon content in the soil that negatively correlates with aflatoxin levels

entities.name: AVAILABLE CALCIUM
entities.description: The amount of calcium available in the soil that negatively correlates with aflatoxin levels

entities.name: FARMERS' AWARENESS
entities.description: The level of knowledge among farmers regarding the aflatoxin problem

entities.name: SEMI-STRUCTURED QUESTIONNAIRE
entities.description: The tool used to assess the awareness level of farmers

entities.name: MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying the prevalence and distribution of pre-harvest aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: FOOD SAFETY
entities.description: The general concern regarding the consumption of contaminated food products
